user_request: Make the loop a little darker and less harsh, but keep the punch.
constraints: avoid reducing transient attack more than necessary

expected_effects: decrease harshness in the 3 kHz to 5 kHz range
safety_limits: do not exceed 3 dB attenuation in a single band

verification_targets: reduced energy in the 3 kHz to 5 kHz region
no material loss of crest factor
rationale: A small upper-mid cut should reduce harshness while preserving punch.
